title: senecio pearsonii
intro: Senecio pearsonii, also known as Pearson's ragwort, is a plant species within the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The health benefits of Senecio pearsonii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant may be used as a tincture or infused in tea, but it is essential to consult a medical professional before using any herbal remedy due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
